3015860.name: BACKROOMS THE COMPANY
3015860.description:
THE COMPANY is a backrooms horror game based off Kane pixels and the complex found footage. you will have to find your way though multiple level's in the backrooms with different paths to go and entity's to watch out for. try not to get lost in these big liminal spaces. there are 2 endings to complete. The company has a realistic VHS effect with unreal engine 5 newest graphics. realistic lighting and textures all though the level's



This is a psychological horror experience based on the "Backrooms" urban legend. View the world through a VHS camera

• Explore immersive backrooms experience

• Explore the backrooms and its liminal feel

• Play though a immersive VHS Camera

• Realistic lighting and textures

Music by NAVE https://linktr.ee/NAVEmusic

PRESS P FOR MENU NOT ESC WILL CHANGE ON NEXT UPDATE



NOTE this game is not connected to the complex or Kane pixels but some parts are inspired

Music by NAVE https://linktr.ee/NAVEmusic
